---
name: Spec Feedback
about: Suggest a change or report an issue with the OSP specification
title: "[SPEC] "
labels: specification
assignees: ''
---

**Which part of the spec does this affect?**
Layer (Discovery / Contracting / Delivery / Settlement) and section.

**What's the issue or suggestion?**
A clear description of what you think should change and why.

**Example**
If applicable, show a before/after of the YAML/Markdown.

**Context**
What were you trying to do when you encountered this? (e.g., "I was trying to describe a consulting service and...")
